atlas v0.5
Back To Use Cases

Use Case

Premium Lifestyle / Cultural Brand

适合生活方式、时尚、文化品牌。需要安静、质感和收藏感，而不是强行工具化。

Primary Family

Quiet Lifestyle Editorial

Structures

Dossier / FeatureCatalog Explorer

Why This Fit Works

从任务反推视觉和结构

Content Shape

Image-led editorials, slower pacing, quiet premium typography.

User Goal

建立品牌气质和阅读意愿，让视觉气氛支撑内容的高级感。

Why

需要安静和质感，不需要过度的 SaaS 组件感。

Avoid

  • 过度工程化
  • 过多功能卡片
  • 高频按钮和促销感

Recommended Families

这个场景最适合借哪几条家族

Web Family

Quiet Lifestyle Editorial

Calmer, slower, more collectible than classic magazine surfaces. The page feels like an issue, catalog, or taste-led brand world.

Historical Roots

Art Deco / Streamlined Luxury

Best For

fashionlifestylecultural brands
Open family
Web Family

Magazine Editorial

Feature-led publishing surfaces. The fold behaves like a cover or lead spread, not like a generic SaaS hero.

Historical Roots

Art Deco / Streamlined LuxurySwiss / International Typographic Style

Best For

cultural publishingfeature homepagesbrand magazines
Open family

Prompt Packet

可以直接复制给 agent 的场景提示

Prompt Packet

Premium Lifestyle / Cultural Brand

Content type: Premium Lifestyle / Cultural Brand IA layer: Dossier / Feature / Catalog Explorer Visual family: Quiet Lifestyle Editorial + Magazine Editorial Reference packet: Quiet Lifestyle Editorial / Magazine Editorial Mood: 适合生活方式、时尚、文化品牌。需要安静、质感和收藏感，而不是强行工具化。 Required traits: 建立品牌气质和阅读意愿，让视觉气氛支撑内容的高级感。 Avoid: 过度工程化 / 过多功能卡片 / 高频按钮和促销感

Design Zondev is a design-style atlas: movement → family → structure → prompt packet.

Updated 2026-03-30 · design.zondev.top
